semantic.role: CLI command adapter for interactive LLM provider, model, and runtime configuration.
responsibilities: Resolves the LLM configuration scope (global or project-level) from raw command-line arguments.
Retrieves the current LLM target configuration via the LLM admin service.
Presents interactive prompts for selecting LLM provider, model, base URL, API key, prompt mode, and validation policy.
Maps provider presets (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic) to default model and API URL settings.
Provides choices for prompt mode (standard, lite) and validation policy tiers.
Prints a formatted LLM configuration status view including provider, model, mode, and credential status.
Executes the overall LLM command flow: determines scope, decides whether to setup or display status, and delegates persistence to the LLM admin service.
Exports type definitions for LLM configuration writers and command execution options.
Exports helper functions for provider choice parsing and mode selection.
outOfScope: Direct access to file system or project configuration persistence.
Authentication or credential management beyond LLM API key handling.
Runtime invocation of LLM models or inference logic.
Project-specific file scanning or repository analysis.
invariants: CLI modules must not absorb pipeline or persistence logic that belongs in services, core, engines, or infra.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a thin CLI adapter that coordinates interactive LLM setup and status display by delegating all persistence and business logic to dedicated services and infra modules.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: ArchSpine v1.0.0 — Architectural Governance & Semantic Layer for the AI Era. This file contributes the CLI command surface for LLM configuration, supporting global and project-scoped setup with interactive prompts and status views.

publicSurface: resolveLLMScope(rawArgs: string[]): { scope: LLMScope; commandArgs: string[] }
getLLMTarget(options: { scope: LLMScope; rootDir: string; config: Config; secrets: Secrets; globalLLMConfig: GlobalLLMConfig; globalLLMSecrets: GlobalLLMSecrets })
promptForLLMSetup(configStore: LLMConfigWriter, secretsStore: LLMSecretsWriter, label: string)
printLLMStatus(options: { runtimeService: RuntimeService; globalLLMConfig: GlobalLLMConfig; globalLLMSecrets: GlobalLLMSecrets; config: Config; secrets: Secrets; rootDir: string; verbose?: boolean })
mapProviderPreset(selection: string): { provider: string; defaultModel?: string; defaultBaseURL?: string }
getModeChoices(selectedMode: LLMMode): { title: string; value: string }[]

English.role: CLI command adapter for interactive LLM provider, model, and runtime configuration.
responsibilities: Resolves the LLM configuration scope (global or project-level) from raw command-line arguments.
Retrieves the current LLM target configuration via the LLM admin service.
Presents interactive prompts for selecting LLM provider, model, base URL, API key, prompt mode, and validation policy.
Maps provider presets (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic) to default model and API URL settings.
Provides choices for prompt mode (standard, lite) and validation policy tiers.
Prints a formatted LLM configuration status view including provider, model, mode, and credential status.
Executes the overall LLM command flow: determines scope, decides whether to setup or display status, and delegates persistence to the LLM admin service.
Exports type definitions for LLM configuration writers and command execution options.
Exports helper functions for provider choice parsing and mode selection.
outOfScope: Direct access to file system or project configuration persistence.
Authentication or credential management beyond LLM API key handling.
Runtime invocation of LLM models or inference logic.
Project-specific file scanning or repository analysis.

Simplified Chinese.role: 用于交互式 LLM 提供商、模型和运行时配置的 CLI 命令适配器。
responsibilities: 从原始命令行参数解析 LLM 配置作用域（全局或项目级别）。
通过 LLM 管理服务获取当前 LLM 目标配置。
提供交互式提示，用于选择 LLM 提供商、模型、基础 URL、API 密钥、提示模式和验证策略。
将提供商预设（例如 OpenAI、Anthropic）映射到默认模型和 API URL 设置。
提供提示模式（标准、精简）和验证策略等级的选择。
打印格式化的 LLM 配置状态视图，包括提供商、模型、模式和凭证状态。
执行整体的 LLM 命令流程：确定作用域，决定是设置还是显示状态，并将持久化委托给 LLM 管理服务。
导出 LLM 配置写入器和命令执行选项的类型定义。
导出提供商选择解析和模式选择的辅助函数。
outOfScope: 直接访问文件系统或项目配置持久化。
超出 LLM API 密钥处理的身份验证或凭证管理。
运行时调用 LLM 模型或推理逻辑。
项目特定的文件扫描或仓库分析。

exports.name: getLLMTarget
promptForLLMSetup
exports.signature:
promptForLLMSetup(
